title: [Skyship, The Corridor]
description: The floor is a single piece of translucent glaes runs the corridor's length, topping a hollowed cavity.  Desiccated, naked bodies of varying races line this recess.  Bright gemstones glowing in a rainbow of hues are inset into the forehead of each preserved figure.  The entire scene is illuminated by sconces mounted throughout the area that cast a dim, flickering light.
